question: [File: 'File Name: monitor/src/main/java/org/hiero/mirror/monitor/config/MonitorConfiguration.java -> Scope: High: Authorizing transactions without approval from signers/owners'] [Function: publish()] Can an unprivileged external user exploit the ConfigurableTransactionGenerator.convert() method (invoked via transactionGenerator.next() in publish()) which uses an ObjectMapper with FAIL_ON_UNKNOWN_PROPERTIES=false and ACCEPT_CASE_INSENSITIVE_PROPERTIES=true to deserialize scenario properties, allowing injection of unexpected property values that override account IDs or keys to target accounts not owned by the operator, bypassing owner approval?
